title: S3: Module Loading Pipeline Sprint
intent: Complete ModuleValidator manifest validation and ModuleLoader hash verification + DSL compilation. ModuleValidator is entirely TODO stubs. ModuleLoader has hash verification and DSL validation stubs. This sprint makes the full module loading pipeline operational: read manifest → validate → hash verify → compile DSL → register as Disabled. Runs in parallel with S2 and S4.
acceptance_criteria: Completed and accepted prior to factory v0.1 migration
